name: ios-dev
description: iOS app lifecycle: simulator build + preview, TestFlight/App Store release (Fastlane + gated pre-flight), repo scaffolding, Xcode Cloud contract, marketing-site kit, and a mined knowledge-skill catalog (MainActor traps, SwiftData+CloudKit rules, widget bridges, Vision/OCR grounding). Requires .claude/app.yml (schema v2) in the target app repo — run /ios-init.
